message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Adds patterns for files that should never be tracked:
- a.out (accidental compiler output)
- __pycache__/ (Python bytecode cache)
- perf.data, perf.data.* (profiling artifacts)
- storage.sqlite3, storage.sqlite3-* (local scratch DBs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +1,27 @@
 # Rust
 /target/
 
+# Common accidental compiler output
+a.out
+
 # Editor/OS noise
 .DS_Store
 .idea/
 .vscode/
 *.swp
 *.swo
 
+# Python cache
+__pycache__/
+
+# Profiling data
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+
+# Local scratch DBs
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
